Title: Manage HR admin surfaces

As a HR lead
I want tracks, reports, and settings surfaces inside HR
So that operational admin work stays in the same module shell

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] The HR module exposes tracks, reports, and settings views.
- [ ] Those views share the same navigation and shell conventions as the rest of HR.

Notes: Implemented in the route shell; correctness of each admin panel’s business logic was not verified.
